hooks.command: [ -f .devflow.yaml ] || exit 0; if [ -f docker-compose.yml ] || [ -f docker-compose.yaml ]; then docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose up -d; fi

[ -f .devflow.yaml ] || exit 0; if [ -f pubspec.yaml ]; then flutter test 2>/dev/null; elif [ -f package.json ] && grep -q '"test"' package.json; then npm test --passWithNoTests 2>/dev/null; elif [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.cfg ]; then python -m pytest 2>/dev/null; elif [ -f Makefile ] && grep -q '^test' Makefile; then make test 2>/dev/null; fi; true

[ -f .devflow.yaml ] || exit 0; git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -n 'TODO\|FIXME\|HACK' 2>/dev/null | head -20 | { read line && echo "⚠ TODOs encontrados:" && echo "$line" && cat; } || true
